texto: Well Abby, it’s not as simple as that. I hate to see you sad sweetheart, but it’s not that bad of a deal just having mommy is it? Are you not happy with me?” I hoped that this would throw her off her the questioning for a little while. It’s not that I never thought about dating, actually I take that back, it’s exactly that and I didn’t know how to get my mindset any differently. Abby looked at me, her baby blues delving deep into my soul “But, you deserve to be happy, too.” she whispered.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de K. Pinson que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Well Abby, it’s not as simple as that. I hate to see you sad sweetheart, but it’s not that bad of…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, abby, avalynn, com foco em avalynn e cute.
